Questions, answered.

Do patients install an app? +

No. They simply scan the QR code — it opens straight in their phone's browser.

How long does setup take? +

Less than 5 minutes. Print the QR, place it at reception, and you're live.

Does it work for multiple doctors? +

Yes — unlimited doctors, each with their own independent queue.

Can I customize queues? +

Yes. Each doctor has their own queue, hours, and availability status.

What does the front desk need to do? +

Just tap "next" when a doctor is ready. Pammi handles the numbering, tracking, and patient notifications automatically.

Stop making patients wait.

Start offering a modern clinic experience today.
